STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STRIKE_KOMACHI.title: Strike
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DEFEND_KOMACHI.title: Defend
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIDER_LILY.title: Spider Lily
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONESOME_LILY.descri:
Whenever you play a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold], add 1 [gold]Lycoris Radiata[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add {Value1:diff()} [gold]Spider Lil{Value1:plural:y|ies}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONESOME_LILY.title: Lonesome Lily
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LYCORIS_RADIATA.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
For the rest of combat, each of your [gold]Lycoris Radiata[/gold] deals {Value1:diff()} more damage and applies {Value2:diff()} more [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE_TOKEN.title: Detonate
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE_TOKEN.title: Release
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHOOT_AND_MOVE.title: Shoot And Move
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVE_AND_SHOOT.title: Move And Shoot
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_FINAL_JUDG:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] to any [gold]Distance[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Damage reduction of far [gold]Distances[/gold] increases this card's damage by double the amount instead.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HANDY_RETREAT.descri:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] by up to +{Value1:diff()}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold] is 5, add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HANDY_RETREAT.title: Handy Retreat
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ENDLESS_WAY.descript:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target.
[gold]Displace[/gold] by +{Value1:diff()}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()} or {Value3}: Apply {Value2} [gold]Tainted[/gold] for every {ReleaseCost} [gold]Released[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ENDLESS_WAY.title: Endless Way
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_TAX.descrip:
Apply the following to each enemy, based on its [gold]Distance[/gold]:
1-2: {Value1:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
3: Lose {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
4-5: {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_TAX.title: Distance Tax
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TASTE_OF_DEATH.title: Taste Of Death
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_DRAW.descriptio:
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Displace[/gold] by up to +{Value1:diff()}.
Draw cards equal to the enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold], then discard 1 card.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_DRAW.title: Pushback Draw
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_THE_REAPER:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FINESSE.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {CalculatedDamage:diff()} time{CalculatedDamage:plural:|s}.
This card attacks a number of times equal to the enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: +1|}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HARDWORKING_SHINIGAM:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
|}At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] in [gold]Hand[/gold], add 1 into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL.descript:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
|}At the start of your turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] ALL enemies by -1.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] ALL enemies by +1.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL.title: Push and Pull
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOD_OF_DEATH.descrip:
Whenever an enemy dies, if it was a [gold]Minion[/gold], [gold]Summon[/gold] {Heal:diff()}. Else, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
The next time your HP would be reduced to 0, instead, heal to 50% of your Max HP, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold], then remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. This effect can only activate once per combat.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOD_OF_DEATH.title: God Of Death
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLOW_OF_THE_SANZU_RI:
Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Whenever an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold]:
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] increased, gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] decreased, gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_GARDEN.des:
Whenever a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] is created, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
Add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] each into your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_TACTICS.de:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
|}Whenever you [gold]Displace[/gold] with [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold]:
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] decreased, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If the [gold]Distance[/gold] increased, add a random Skill into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WEED_CUTTER.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card.
Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WEED_CUTTER.title: Weed Cutter
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_PARRY.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] to the hand.
Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_PARRY.title: Scythe Parry
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-COIN_THROW.title: Coin Throw
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVING_DEFEND.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For each enemy whose [gold]Distance[/gold] is {Value1:diff()} or more, add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MOVING_DEFEND.title: Moving Defend
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.descripti:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1-{Value1:diff()} cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:, [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]}.
For each card, add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card was [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.title: Work Focus
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-WORK_FOCUS.selection: Select cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. If an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ACCOMPANYING_SPY_SPI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever this enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold], [gold]Summon[/gold] {Value1:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SLICE_OF_HIGAN.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times.
Whenever an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold], increase this card's damage by {Value1:diff()} for the rest of combat.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SLICE_OF_HIGAN.title: Slice Of Higan
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EQUALIZE_DISTANCE.de:
[gold]Displace[/gold] until [gold]Distance[/gold] is 3.
Draw {Value1:diff()} card{Value1:plural:|s} for each level [gold]Displaced[/gold].
If [gold]Distance[/gold] is already 3, draw {Value2} and discard 1 card instead.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RITUAL_OF_ECSTASY.de:
{AltDescription:choose(0|1):Invert the enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold].
If it increased, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If it decreased, draw {Value1:diff()} cards.
If [gold]Distance[/gold] is 3, you may choose instead.|{ExtraDescription1}|{ExtraDescription2}}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIFE.descri:
If the enemy's HP is lower than your Max HP, swap your HP with the enemy's, then remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold] if your HP increased.
[gold]When drawn[/gold]: lose {Value1:diff()} HP and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIFE.title: Exchange Life
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GRUDGING_STRIKE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VengefulSpiritApplication:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Add 1 [gold]Detonate+[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_DEFENSE.title: Human Spirits Passing By
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-NO_HARD_FEELINGS.des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold]. The enemy loses 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value2} [gold]Spirits[/gold] [gold]Detonated[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GRUDGE_OF_THE_DEAD.d:
Whenever [gold]Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold] ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOUND_SPIRITS_OF_EAR:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
At the end of your turn, apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to each enemy with [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GUIDING_SANZU.title: Guiding Sanzu
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOOM_BENEFITS.title: Siren's Bounty
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SWEEP.description:
[gold]Displace[/gold] ALL enemies by {Value1:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Manipulate Distance{Cards:plural:|s}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SWEEP.title: Sweeping Scythe
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SWEEP.descr:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Apply it again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SWEEP.title: Spirits of the Firm
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFULER_SWEEP.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2}: Repeat this card's effects.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFULER_SWEEP.ext:
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2}: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FREE_TRAUMA.descript:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()} or {Value3:diff()}: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every {Value2} [gold]Spirits[/gold] released.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FREE_TRAUMA.title: Free Trauma?!
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply a [gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN.d:
At the start of your turn, gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: At the start of your next turn, gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN.e: [gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: At the start of your next turn, gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FOREVER_CANCELLED.de:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
Whenever [gold]Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold], apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to 50% the [gold]Detonated[/gold] amount, rounded up, to the same enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRITUAL_STRIKE.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
Increase the duration of the enemy's [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] by 1.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CHAIN_DETONATION.des:
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Detonate[/gold] the enemy.
Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount [gold]Detonated[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: [gold]Detonate[/gold] the enemy, again.
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value3:diff()}: Apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount [gold]Detonated[/gold], again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CHAIN_DETONATION.ext: [gold]Release[/gold] {Value3}: [gold]Detonate[/gold], then apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] equal to the amount [gold]Detonate[/gold], again.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RESIDUAL_AETHER.desc:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]While in Hand[/gold]: Whenever [gold]Detonation[/gold] happens, increase this card's {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} gain by 1.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-QUICK_NAP.descriptio:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
End your turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-QUICK_NAP.title: Quick Nap
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_ROAMING_SP:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals {Value1:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] on the enemy.
If this kills an enemy, apply its [gold]Vengeful Spirit[/gold] on ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SCYTHE_OF_EXORCISM.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Optional[/gold]: [gold]Detonate[/gold]. If {Value1:diff()} or more [gold]Spirits[/gold] were [gold]Detonated[/gold], add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {Value2:diff()}: Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] before [gold]Detonation[/gold]. Gain 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EYE_OF_THE_STORM.des:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: [gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DIVINE_PROTECTION.de:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Gain {Value1:diff()} more [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_RETURN.descri:
At the start of your turn, add up to 1 card that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} or less in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [gold]Clone[/gold], and is removed from combat when played.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_RETURN.title: Spirit Return
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.descri:
Choose 1 of {Value1:diff()} random cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold], then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the rest.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.select: Choose a card to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The rest are [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-MINISTRY_WORK.title: Ministry Work
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] ALL: [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Spirits[/gold] [gold]Released[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.extra: [gold]Release[/gold] ALL: [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Spirits[/gold] [gold]Released[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SPIRIT_BARRIER.title: Spirit Barrier
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-AFTERLIFE_PASSAGE.de: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1-{Value3:diff()} card(s) from your [gold]Hand[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]}. For each card, if it was a [gold]Status[/gold], [gold]Curse[/gold], or [gold]Basic[/gold] card, gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold], else, gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REAPERS_DUE.descript:
For every {Energy:energyIcons()} spent: Gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
For every {Energy2:energyIcons()} spent: Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
For every {Energy3:energyIcons()} spent: Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REAPERS_DUE.title: Reaper's Due
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLOSE_QUARTER_TECHNI:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
If [gold]Distance[/gold] is less than 3, gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold], and the enemy loses {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FERRIAGE_DEEP_FOG.de:
[gold]Displace[/gold] by up to -{Value1:diff()}.
Apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] for every level of [gold]Displacement[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost}: Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on the enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FERRIAGE_DEEP_FOG.ex: [gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost}: Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every {Value3:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on the enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHORT_LIFE_EXPECTANC:
[gold]Release[/gold] {ReleaseCost:diff()}: Deal damage equal to 50% of the enemy's HP.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ETHICALLY_SOURCED_BR:
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Value1:diff()}.
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. Gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
End your turn.
Next turn, end your turn.
Next turn after that, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST.desc:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL cards EVERYWHERE. Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold] per [gold]Hand[/gold] card, {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold] per [gold]Draw[/gold] card, and apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold] to ALL enemies per [gold]Discard[/gold] card.
Start of next turn, choose up to {Value2:diff()} non-[gold]Basic[/gold] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] cards to return randomly into the three piles. Then, return all [gold]Basics[/gold] to your [gold]Draw[/gold] pile.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST.titl: Souls at The End of The Road
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STRONGEST_SPIRIT.des:
Deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage.
Apply [blue]{Value1:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Release[/gold] [blue]{ReleaseCost:diff()}[/blue]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold]. For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, deal damage again. If [blue]9[/blue] cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, gain [blue]{Value2:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STRONGEST_SPIRIT.ext: [gold]Release[/gold] [blue]{ReleaseCost:diff()}[/blue]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Attack again for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. If [blue]9[/blue] or more cards were [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, gain [blue]{Value2:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXCHANGE_LIVING_AND_: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Add another card of the same type in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If there's none, draw {Value1:diff()} cards.
Exchange of the Living and Dead
Choose a card to return to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. At the start of your 2nd turn after this, add that card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. Return it to the hand [gold]Upgraded[/gold] in 2 turns.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TOUR_GUIDE_TO_THE_NE:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. For each card drawn, activate an effect based on its rarity:
[gold]Uncommon[/gold]: Gain {Value2:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Rare[/gold]: Gain {Value3:diff()} [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold].
[gold]Other[/gold]: Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STYGIAN_REEL.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Displace[/gold] by -{Value1:diff()}.
At the start of this enemy's next turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] by +{Value1:diff()}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STYGIAN_REEL.title: Stygian Reel
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-POSSESSED_ARMAMENT.d: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RECURSIVE_SOULS.desc: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {Value1:diff()} [gold]Guided Spirit{Value1:plural:|s}[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW.descr:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
|}At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] in [gold]Hand[/gold], add 1 into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. 
[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold] only give you 1 [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW.title: Riverside View
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-STORM_OF_THE_GRIEVIN:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
If X is 2 or more, add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM.descr:
{IfUpgraded:show:
Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
|}Close [gold]Distances[/gold] increases damage taken by enemies by a further 100%/50%. Far [gold]Distances[/gold] reduce damage dealt by enemies by a further 15%/30%. The latter is unstackable.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM.title: Shinigami Form
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PARASITIC_POLLEN.des:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Value1:diff()} times.
 Add 1 [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. If you are [gold]Poisoned[/gold], lose {Value2:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold], then apply double the amount lost.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXTINCT_FAUNA.descri:
Whenever you play a card:
- If there's a card with the same name in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], you may add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
- If there's none, create a {Energy:energyIcons()} [gold]Clone[/gold] of it, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that [gold]Clone[/gold].
Each effect can only activate once per turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EXTINCT_FAUNA.title: Extinct Fauna of the Sanzu River
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.description:
Choose 1 card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] or [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Add a [gold]Clone[/gold] of it into your [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Retain[/gold] it this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.title: Oasis of Passing Souls
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-OASIS.selectionScree: Choose a card to [gold]Clone[/gold]. It is [gold]Retained[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EIKI_FREE_RELEASE.de: You do not pay the [gold]Release[/gold] costs of cards.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TIP_OF_THE_REAPER.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold]: Add 1 [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GHOSTRICK_SHOT.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Value1:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold].
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], apply {Value2:diff()} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GHOSTRICK_SHOT.title: Ghostrick Shot
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.descr:
Discard 1 card.
Choose up to 2 cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
Add the 1st into your [gold]Hand[/gold], and the 2nd into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. Reduce their cost to 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.title: Double Hooking
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DOUBLE_HOOKING.selec: Choose up to 2 cards. The first card is added to your [gold]Hand[/gold], and the second is added to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
